transcript: Religion is accustomary, tell me why I only ever pray when I'm nervous. I don't even love you baby like all my other passions I've left you deserted. Take me to a monastery so I can light a candle and then ask for atonement.
text:
Religion is accustomary, tell me why I only ever pray when I'm nervous. I don't even love you baby like all my other passions I've left you deserted. Take me to a monastery so I can light a candle and then ask for atonement.

Take a deep breath, take a deep breath.

I found you waiting with the patience of an elephant.
